backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Change the login endpoint from GET to POST to adhere to RESTful best practices for authentication.
Refactor login parameters from query strings to a JSON request body using a DTO.
Add a new endpoint to retrieve a demo admin user, restricted to development and testing profiles.
Inject InstitutionService to provide institution context for demo user creation.
Import User.State enum to specify user status during creation.
Update createMemberWithAuth call to include institution and state parameters.
Update createVolunteerWithAuth call to include state parameter.
Update the caught exception type from SignatureException to SecurityException to align with the current behavior or API of the JWT library.
Change the active field from Boolean wrapper to boolean primitive to enforce non-nullability and reduce overhead.
Ensure a confirmation token is generated immediately upon user instantiation.
Introduce a persistent 'active' boolean field to track user status instead of hardcoding it.
Update isActive() to return the field value and add a setter to allow modifying the active status.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.human_impl: return this.active; // replaced return true; + added setActive method

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Add a public no-argument constructor to the DTO class to ensure compatibility with frameworks requiring default constructors.
Add a public no-argument constructor to the DTO class to ensure compatibility with frameworks requiring default constructors (e.g., Jackson, JPA).
Remove unnecessary empty lines between field declarations to clean up code style.
backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.human_impl: Removed blank lines between private String name; and private String username; etc.

backend/src/main/java/pt/ulisboa/tecnico.general_idea: Changed the resource handler path from '/images/questions/**' to '/documents/declarations**' to reflect a change in the served content structure.
Updated the Swagger UI webjar version from 4.10.3 to 5.10.3 in the resource handler configuration.
